transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: It recasts consumption as temporary relief from a self-renewing craving, then challenges learned ideas about taste and reward while contrasting freedom with restrictive dieting; sweeping causal claims weaken credibility.
paraphrased_evidence.B: It recasts consumption as temporary relief from a self-renewing craving, then challenges learned ideas about taste and reward while contrasting freedom with restrictive dieting; sweeping causal claims weaken credibility.

parsed.generic_mechanism: When blocks use the same causal reframing, examples, and freedom framing in the same sequence, they should produce equivalent belief movement.
